text: Standing just outside a conference room, I hear talk of accessibility and the need to be seen—both literally and figuratively. I feel encouraged, as though at the edge of meaningful change. Moments later, surrounded by innovation and words about research and development, I sense the pulse of progress but also the patience required for ideas to evolve. I feel curious—hungry to understand how these intentions might become reality and how I, too, might be seen as accessible in an ever-changing landscape.
